allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: LeTrend app with UI updates and full app flow

- Next.js 16 app with Mantine UI and Tailwind CSS
- DM Sans font integration
- LeTrend brown color palette \(#4A2F18 primary\)
- Multiple dashboard variants \(dashboard-1, dashboard-2\)
- New full app flow at /app with:
  - Login view \(Swedish\)
  - Plan selection and payment
  - Brand profile with TikTok analysis
  - Concept preview and unlock flow
  - Brief view with script, checklist, analysis tabs
- Documentation and training data for concept marketplace

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, @{N=''MB'';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}}, StartTime | Format-Table")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.WorkingSet64 -gt 100MB} | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, Id, @{N=''MB'';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process | Where-Object {$_ProcessName -match ''uvx|workspace|python''} | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, CPU, @{N=''MB'';E={[math]::Round\($_WorkingSet64/1MB\)}} | Format-Table")

Bash(cmd //c "taskkill /F /PID 8824 & taskkill /F /PID 23268 & taskkill /F /PID 17584 & taskkill /F /PID 23216 & taskkill /F /PID 6836 & taskkill /F /PID 16520 & taskkill /F /PID 7736 & taskkill /F /PID 17784")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\Ibnadmin\\Desktop\\hagen-ui" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Stripe payments, admin auth, and production readiness

- Stripe integration: subscriptions, invoices, webhooks, customer sync
- Admin auth via JWT + is_admin column \(fallback: @letrend.se\)
- Rate limiting on public endpoints
- Email confirmations via Resend
- Invoice page with configurable company info
- Agreement flow for pre-registered customers
- Protected test/debug endpoints
- Centralized env validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
